history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I should turn to find a safe route. The cell below me at row 03 column B is safe, so turning right will face down toward that open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell below me at row 03 column B is safe floor, so the best next move is to advance into that safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 04 column B is safe, so I should continue moving forward toward the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The next cell ahead, row 05 column B, is safe floor, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 06 column B is safe floor, so I should move forward to continue toward the lower open area and eventually the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 07 column B is safe floor, so moving forward is the best next step to progress along the open corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 08 column B is safe floor, while the goal is farther to the right. I should move forward to reach the lower area before turning toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 09 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To head toward the goal at row 08 column H, I need to face right, which requires a counter-clockwise turn from down to right? Actually from down to right is a left turn.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The path directly to the right is blocked at column C by lava, so I cannot go straight. I need to find an alternate safe route, and the only open adjacent safe cell is to the left? No, that's a wall. Since moving forward is unsafe and turning alone doesn't move me, I should consider that the safe route is unavailable from here; however, the map shows row 07 has a safe corridor leading right, so I should turn to face up and move there.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing up (`^`). The cell ahead at row 07 column B is open, and moving there is safe. This is the best next step toward the upper corridor that can lead around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 07 column B facing up (`^`). The cell ahead at row 06 column B is open, so I can continue upward along the safe corridor. This keeps me moving toward the route that can eventually lead around the lava to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is open, so moving forward is safe and keeps me progressing north toward the upper path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is clear, so moving forward is safe and continues me toward the top of the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is a lava cell, so I must not move forward. The safe path is to turn right and head east along row 04 toward the open cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 04 column C is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The only safe immediate move is to turn and look for another route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe floor, so moving forward progresses me into the open lower corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 06 column B is safe floor, so I should move forward to continue along the left corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is safe floor, so moving forward is the best way to keep descending toward the lower corridor and the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 08 column B is safe floor, so I should move forward rather than turn, continuing toward the lower area where the goal is reachable.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 09 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn to follow the open corridor; to head toward the goal on the right, I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 08 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. I should avoid it and turn to find a safe route around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing up. The path upward through column B is clear, while the cells to the right are lava. Moving forward is safe and progresses me toward the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 07 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 06 column B is safe, and moving forward continues me along the clear corridor toward the top, avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing up. The goal is to the lower right, but the direct rightward path from here is blocked by lava patterns, so I should keep moving up through the safe corridor to find a way around the hazard.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing up, with a wall directly ahead at row 04 column B? No, row 04 column B is open, so moving forward is safe and keeps me progressing through the corridor toward a route around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
